extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Studio Web Templates tab open, with the search box filled with "orchestrator tool" to filter available templates. The Orchestrator Tools Template card is visible, and its three-dot context menu is open with the option "New solution from template" highlighted. The UI is in a state where the user is about to create a new solution from the selected template.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the Templates tab.
2. In the search field, enter "orchestrator tool".
3. On the Orchestrator Tools Template card, open the three-dot menu.
4. Click on "New solution from template".
